name: fetch
description: Download a video from a URL (YouTube, TikTok, Instagram, etc.) using yt-dlp

output.description: Path to downloaded file, or JSON {paths:[...]} for multi-video downloads

params.name: url
params.description: URL to download (video page, profile, or playlist)

params.name: out
params.description: Output directory or file path. Defaults to current directory.

params.name: limit
params.description: Max number of videos to download from a playlist or channel
